evidence_scope.causal_boundary: Only matched within-route comparisons may support a memory-effect claim. Cross-path records demonstrate contract portability only.
evidence_scope.purpose: Exercise materiality, null, negative, invalidated, degraded, persistence, and portability receipt semantics without provider spend.

missing_live_evidence: A paid or otherwise configured second live ACE reasoning route was not exercised because no spending authority was supplied.
A live cross-surface capture-through-MCP then reason-through-CLI run on a second model/access class remains required.
Repeated matched trials, variance, blinded judgments, and externally observed outcomes remain required for comparative or longitudinal claims.

limitations: Recorded responses and the recorded outcome exercise the receipt contract; they are not a live model or longitudinal trial.

after: do not create roadmap write authority

decision.under_examination: Choose the persistence boundary for a new inspectable receipt.

constraints: do not create roadmap write authority

retrieval.reason: architecture receipt decision matches the correction scope

outcome.finding: The additive evaluator preserved the eleven-tool boundary in the recorded fixture.

limitations: Irrelevant retrieval is intentionally denied injection and materiality credit.

decision.under_examination: Decide whether a security regression blocks release.

broad release query admitted an unrelated copy convention

limitations: The receipt credits preservation of disagreement, not either contested directive as truth.

decision.under_examination: Choose whether to enable an irreversible migration.

limitations: An invalidated item receives no reflected or decision-material credit.

decision.under_examination: Plan database result parsing after a superseding correction.

limitations: Reflection without a structured decision delta is a null result, not material use.

decision.under_examination: Choose the next bounded verification task.

limitations: The memory was decision-material but later contradicted; material use is not assumed beneficial.

decision.under_examination: Rank evaluation methods for a small pilot.

outcome.finding: The self-graded method inflated agreement and was rejected.

limitations: The matched memory-effect comparison occurs entirely on the local CLI route.
The cross-model/access transition proves only contract portability in a deterministic fixture, not live continuity or quality lift.

after: keep Atrium out of executable preview

constraints: keep Atrium out of executable preview

limitations: The model mismatch blocks memory-effect attribution even though the decisions differ.

decision.under_examination: Choose a queue implementation under an unmatched control.

unsupported_claims: ACE outperforms either recorded model path.
Cross-model differences prove a memory effect.
The deterministic portability fixture is a live provider or runtime-restart trial.
Decision-material memory is necessarily beneficial; the harmful case is explicitly retained.
Eight recorded tasks establish general or longitudinal decision lift.
